title: Le tecniche di cottura
grammar_features_introduced: Italian verb infinitives across the three conjugation classes (-are, -ere, -ire)
infinitive as imperative in recipe-writing register (bollire, soffriggere, aggiungere)
prepositional verbs: cuocere al forno / al vapore / in padella
fixed phrases: aggiustare di sale, a fuoco lento, a dadini, a fette
nominalization: mantecare → la mantecatura (not introduced; mentioned as next step)
cognate_patterns_showcased: fr -er / it -are (couper / tagliare — not direct but shape-cognate)
French infinitive → Italian infinitive stem-guessing heuristic
notes: Second cooking lesson, still A2. Introduces a compact verb vocabulary and the three conjugation classes — infinitives only, no person/tense inflection yet. Lots of recipe-register idiom (aggiustare di sale, cuocere a fuoco lento).
